allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/initials" -Method Get; "OK. Инициалы:"; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "Ошибка: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "D:\\Школа Almiron\\doc_web"; $p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "server.py" -PassThru -RedirectStandardError "_err.txt" -RedirectStandardOutput "_out.txt" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \($p.HasExited\) { "ВЫШЕЛ код $\($p.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content _err.txt -Tail 20 } else { "Работает \(PID $\($p.Id\)\)"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { $_ } })
